description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky handgun with a predominantly gray body accented by gold highlights. The frame is angular, with a rectangular trigger guard and a squared-off grip, both featuring gold panels that contrast with the matte gray finish. The slide is boxy and features two parallel gold stripes and a circular gold detail, suggesting a simplified representation of a safety or takedown lever. The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front and rear, both capped with gold-colored ends. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with no visible texturing or fine details, giving it a digital or voxel-like appearance. The proportions and color scheme make it visually distinct and easily recognizable as a handgun in an urban context.
description: A blocky, gray handgun with gold accents, featuring a rectangular grip and trigger guard, and a short, cylindrical barrel. Its minimalist, geometric design is highlighted by gold stripes and panels.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the gold-accented grip, trigger guard, and two gold stripes on the slide, with a circular gold detail above the trigger area.
description_view_1: The front view displays the cylindrical gold barrel end and the narrow profile of the slide and grip, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the gold grip and trigger guard, but without the circular gold detail above the trigger.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights the gold-capped rear of the barrel and the squared-off back of the grip, with the gold base of the magazine visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular and blocky, with a flat gold panel covering most of its surface, giving it a visually distinct two-tone appearance. There is no visible texturing, finger grooves, or ergonomic contouring, resulting in a simple, angular profile. The grip appears smooth and unadorned, lacking any logos, checkering, or embellishments. Its straight edges and flat surfaces suggest a utilitarian, minimalist design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rectangular and thick, with sharp, squared-off edges and a flat gold panel on its outer face. It is large and boxy, providing ample space around the trigger area, but lacks any undercuts, curvature, or reinforcement. The design is purely geometric, with no visible texturing or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from both the front and rear of the slide, and is capped with gold-colored ends. It has a smooth, unmarked exterior with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. The profile is simple and unadorned, matching the overall blocky aesthetic.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features two parallel gold stripes on its side and a circular gold detail above the trigger area, but there are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations. The markings are purely decorative and geometric, lacking any text or intricate patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with a gold finish that matches the grip and trigger guard accents. It is flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, beveling, or finger rest. The design is simple and untextured, with no visible logos or embellishments.
